index_description: Builder of solutions for the world
about_description: I started in the IT world from a very young age, being the 'weirdo' of the group of my friends for preferring to study than to go out partying, I have always been very self-taught, I learn thanks to the knowledge that the web offers.
about_description2: I studied Electronic Engineering because I am very passionate about the world of digital systems, in addition to always having a passion for programming. I want to be a great professional who contributes to the construction of the future of technology.
about_first-job: I started my first job as a fullstack Junior developer at Jaivaná
about_second-job: I started my second job as fullstack at Negozia CF
about_mintic-job: I started my way like tutor in misión tic
about_start-programming_description: In a 'Self-taught' way through texts and video tutorials
about_finish-high-school_description: In the high school colegio Policarpa Salavarrieta from Quimbaya, Quindío
about_first-job_description: I started my working life like full-stack developer in Jaivaná, working with Java, SQL, no SQL, Flutter, React and Nextjs
about_finish-university_description: Electronic engineering graduate with a deepening in digital systems
about_second-job_description: As a full stack developer with technologies such as: React, mongo DB, express
about_mintic-job_description: As tutor in the misión tic project from national goverment of Colombia
about_finish-sena_description: Where I learned HTML, CSS, PHP and MySQL
projects_kiwi-description: Kiwi peluditos is a platform where people can add the data of their pets, contact data, vaccines, diseases and generate a unique QR code that identifies them, in addition to allowing them to report their disappearance
projects_tgrado-description: This platform was developed as a job at the University of Quindío, it is a platform for the complete administration of degree projects of the Electronic Engineering program
projects_sintel-description: Sintel is a software for the modeling and simulation of digital systems, it allows to see in real time the behavior of digital circuits, in addition to exporting the model to HDL codes such as Verilog and VHDL
projects_mips-description: I have modeled and simulated a pipelined 32-bit MIPS microprocessor, inputs and outputs were added to the system, as well as an example assembler code
projects_sti-description: Platform for the management of automatic irrigation of plantations, my work was the construction of the api and the administration platform, as well as a python software for a raspberry pi v3
